LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, FEB-22-2021 HEARING HELD RE: DEFENDANTS MAURICIO PEREA, CANDELARIO PEREA, AND JUANA OROPEZA'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANTS CANDELARIO PEREA AND JUANA OROPEZA, AND IS DENIED AS TO DEFENDANT MAURICIO RASCON PEREA. ORDER SIGNED. (SEE SIGNED ORDER FOR COMPLETE RULING.) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-20-2021 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2021 Continued To Apr-14-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DAVID P. KASHANI, Esq. of Law Offices of David P. Kashani, APLC (Tel: 323-782-9605) for Plaintiff Ignacio Nicholas Quiroz;
Atty. BRENDON L.S. HANSEN, Esq. of McNamara, Ney, Beatty, Slattery, Borges & Ambacher LLP (Tel: 707-427-3998) for Defendants Mauricio Rascon Perea, Candelario Perea, and Juana Oropeza.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS MAURICIO PEREA, CANDELARIO PEREA, AND JUANA OROPEZA'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendants' motion to strike punitive damages is granted as to Defendants Candelario Perea and Juana Oropeza, and is denied as to Defendant Mauricio Rascon Perea. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
